latest.title: Safe system updates with data preservation
latest.summary: OkamaOS can now apply repo-hosted system update bundles that replace CLI, shell, runtime, and brand files while preserving games, saves, settings, and update backups.
notes: Adds real okama-update apply support for .okupdate system bundles.
Backs up replaced system files before applying an update.
Preserves games, saves, controllers, logs, cache, update history, and parent/developer config.

channels.name: public-preview
channels.description: Fast-moving public preview channel for early OkamaOS users and creators.

channels.name: stable
channels.description: Reserved for signed production images after validation.
